series_metadata.series_description: Includes any correspondence (letters, memos, emails, research), documents (telephone messages, post-it notes, drafts and other limited documents) or other informal communication (voicemail, chats, social media posts, instant and text messages, and shared departmental calendars) which serve to convey information of temporary importance.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: no longer of administrative value
